summary: Full e2e validation of IBIG PARTNERS 7-vagues upgrade. Backend Coach IA endpoint working (5/5 pytest pass). Frontend all 7 vagues + login/navigation/logout fully functional. No blocking issues found. One minor data inconsistency: koffi@example.com shows status 'Starter' in /espace UI although test_credentials.md and request describe him as GOLD.

issues: Koffi user displays statut 'Starter' badge in topbar and 'Progression de statut → 4/10 ventes pour Silver', but test_credentials.md and review_request describe Koffi as GOLD. Either fix the seed/status calculation or update credentials doc.

action_items: Optional: reconcile Koffi seed status (UI shows 'Starter' instead of GOLD). Either update seed CA/ventes so status calc returns GOLD or update /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers, but functional.
Coach IA session_id is derived from hash(req.message) — works but means each turn opens a fresh session (no memory beyond the manually-injected history_text). Acceptable for current UX.
Frontend /espace/liens shows only 2 ViralShare cards — make sure all branches/products are exposed if Koffi has more activated branches in future.
test_credentials: koffi@example.com / password123 (works). Note: UI status = 'Starter' (mismatch with doc that says GOLD).
context_for_next_testing_agent: VAGUE 1 (Landing): live-calculator slider updates result-monthly (verified 66 000 FCFA after ArrowRight). social-proof-bar shows 400 partenaires, 1.3M FCFA, 360 ventes, +72 inscrits. hall-of-fame podium 1/2/3 all rendered. 4 testimonials (Koffi/Aya/Moussa/Fatou) present. sticky-mobile-cta visible at 390x844 after scroll. VAGUE 2: onboarding-quest with 5 steps; 4 marked '✓ OK' (profile, activate, link, prospect), share step still pending — matches PRD. VAGUE 3: 2 viral-share cards, each with 3 tone tabs, 5 share buttons (WhatsApp/Facebook/Telegram/Twitter/Instagram), affiliate-link input + copy-link button. VAGUE 4: coach-chat + coach-input + coach-send + 6 quick-{0..5} shortcuts; welcome message contains 'Salut Koffi', badge 'En ligne · GPT-5.4 Mini'; clicking quick-0 returned a 544-char French WhatsApp pitch within ~15s. VAGUE 5: celebration-toast visible top-right ('Promotion de niveau — Félicitations !'). VAGUE 6: certification-banner with progress 0/4, certificate button disabled with text '🔒 Certificat verrouillé'. VAGUE 7: weekly-challenge with countdown '6j 2h 5min', objective 3 ventes, +5000 FCFA bonus. Backend POST /api/coach/chat returns valid {reply: ...} multi-line French response (avg ~1s). Login/logout work — login button submit → /espace; clicking 'Déconnexion' returns to landing.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bug. Only cosmetic: Koffi's status badge shows 'Starter' because the status is computed from realized monthly sales (likely <X threshold), while test_credentials.md labels him 'GOLD'. Either seed more sales or update the doc.
